channel.title: USP on Jonathan Nishikawa — SEO Consultant
channel.description: Recent content in USP on Jonathan Nishikawa — SEO Consultant

item.title: Bonnie Haig Art: Why a painter with 18 works and a subscriber goal needed a USP before she needed a funnel
item.description: Before advising on email list growth, the audit identified the underlying problem: no one visiting Bonnie’s site could determine whether she sold anything. The central recommendation was a USP built around her nursing professional background.
